summary: Diff adds a new AR rendering/effects stack (makeup, ornaments with secondary motion, glow, sparkles, background blur), variant effect modules (bridal/anime/festival), capture-to-PNG utility, settings state with defaults, and a Lens Notes UI component. A camera error panel is included. However, due to truncated/omitted files, it’s unclear whether the main AR page provides the full required UI (camera start/stop, variant switching UI, capture button, background blur toggle/intensity controls) and wiring of these pieces.

hallucinated_features.description: Added an Internet Computer backend canister stub with an empty actor.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specifies no external backend services and does not request adding an IC backend at this stage; adding a backend file is extra to the requested frontend AR experience.
